name: Stickman Parkour 3
description: Stickman Parkour Vol3 Your mission is to run , And Climb walls to reach the the door to unlock the next level. Be careful to not fall from edges and try to avoid obstacles. Let the adventure begins!
instructions: A and D to move left and right use W to jump and climb use S and D or A to scroll you can also use arrows
tags: Action, Adventure, Best, Hot, Hypercasual, jump, Jumping, run, running, Stickman
